# PingsMe

> PingsMe is a real-time messaging platform with group chats, HD video & voice calls, file sharing, collaborative whiteboards, task management, and AI-powered chat assistant.

## Product

PingsMe is a full-stack web application built for seamless real-time communication. Users can register, find contacts by username, exchange messages instantly, make HD video/voice calls, create group chats, manage tasks, and share files — all from a single, beautifully designed interface.

## Key Features

- Real-time private and group messaging via Socket.IO
- HD video and voice calls powered by Agora WebRTC
- File and image sharing with Cloudinary storage
- Collaborative whiteboard (canvas-based drawing tool)
- Task/Kanban board — convert messages into tasks
- AI chat assistant triggered with @ai in any chat
- Self-destructing messages with countdown timers
- OTP-based email verification and JWT authentication
- Dark mode, emoji reactions, read receipts, typing indicators
- Admin dashboard with broadcast messaging, user reports, and suggestions

## Target Audience

Individuals, teams, and communities who want a private, feature-rich alternative to mainstream messaging apps.

## Pages

- [Home](https://pingsme.in/) — Landing page with features, how-it-works, FAQ, contact, privacy, and terms

## Contact

- Support: supportpingmechat@gmail.com
- Website: https://pingsme.in

## Legal

- Privacy Policy: https://pingsme.in/#legal
- Terms of Service: https://pingsme.in/#legal

## Technology

- Frontend: React 18, Material UI, Socket.IO Client, Agora RTC SDK
- Backend: Node.js, Express, MongoDB Atlas (Mongoose), Socket.IO
- Hosting: Vercel (frontend), Render (backend)
